properties.name: SEA-ME-WE 5 (Marseille-Mumbai)
properties.wounding_strategy: The Digital Financial Gateway: As nations rapidly digitize their financial ecosystems, they become hyper-reliant on real-time server handshakes across continents. A coordinated 'grey-zone' disruption in the highly congested Mediterranean or Arabian Sea segments of this route wouldn't kill anyone, but it would freeze international digital payments, paralyzing gig economies and stock markets for hours or days.

properties.name: MAREA Cable
properties.wounding_strategy: High-capacity transatlantic link. Crucial for massive data replication.

properties.name: Porthcurno Landing (UK)
properties.wounding_strategy: The pattern here is plausible deniability. A nation doesn't bomb these landing stations. Instead, a 'rogue' commercial fishing trawler drops its anchor over a critical transatlantic fiber-optic bundle, dragging and snapping it. The ensuing internet outage paralyzes banking in London for days. It is an economic wound disguised as a maritime accident.

properties.name: Fortaleza Subsea Hub (Brazil)
properties.wounding_strategy: The pattern here is plausible deniability. A nation doesn't bomb these landing stations. Instead, a 'rogue' commercial fishing trawler drops its anchor over a critical transatlantic fiber-optic bundle, dragging and snapping it. The ensuing internet outage paralyzes banking in São Paulo for days. It is an economic wound disguised as a maritime accident.

properties.name: PLCN Landing (Taiwan)
properties.wounding_strategy: Cyber Severance: The strategy is asymmetric disruption. The microchips may be printed in Taipei, but if the data flow is severed at the landing nodes, the global supply chain halts just the same, but with minimal geopolitical fallout.
